subcodes.first_line: O luminous meteor! I have indeed concentrated my thoughts and gaze upon the meanings of your gracious letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشهاب النورانی انی قد امعنت فکری و نظری فی معانی مرسومکم اللطیف و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @growth of the Cause
